name: ssh-tool
description: SSH multi-hop tool for AI agents - MCP support, daemon, file transfer, background exec

scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js dist/__tests__/logger.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-hop-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer.test.js dist/__tests__/background-exec.test.js dist/__tests__/port-forwarding.test.js dist/__tests__/error-handling.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-server.test.js dist/__tests__/session-reuse.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-ipc.test.js dist/__tests__/agent-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-classifier.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-service.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/virtual-cwd.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-scheduler.test.js
scripts.test:fast: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/logger.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-ipc.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/cli-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-replacement.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-streaming-runner.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-classifier.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-service.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-recent.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store-bytes.test.js dist/__tests__/virtual-cwd.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-scheduler.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-background-handle.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-host.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-client-race.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-session-concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/stress-test.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer-sftp-end.test.js
scripts.test:scheduler: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/scheduler-classifier.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-service.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store.test.js dist/__tests__/virtual-cwd.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-scheduler.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-streaming-runner.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/cli-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-session-concurrency.test.js
scripts.test:ssh: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-hop-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer.test.js dist/__tests__/background-exec.test.js dist/__tests__/port-forwarding.test.js dist/__tests__/error-handling.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-server.test.js dist/__tests__/session-reuse.test.js dist/__tests__/agent-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-lifecycle.test.js dist/__tests__/performance.test.js dist/__tests__/integration.test.js
scripts.test:load: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/stress-test.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-session-concurrency.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run build:test && npm run test:fast && npm run test:transfer && npm run test:ssh && npm run test:integration && npm run test:performance && npm run test:load
